testpoints.name: initial_fetch_request
testpoints.description: Initial state: PC=0x80000000, priv=3. First process() sends icache read request.

testpoints.name: icache_accepts_request
testpoints.description: ICache accepts the read request: req_sent→wait_data transition.

testpoints.name: icache_returns_data
testpoints.description: ICache returns valid instruction data: wait_data→pending_ready transition.

testpoints.name: decode_accepts_instruction
testpoints.description: Decode stage accepts the fetched instruction: pending_ready cleared, PC advances by 4.

testpoints.name: branch_request
testpoints.description: Branch request from execution: PC updated to target, squash_decode=1, FSM reset.

testpoints.name: icache_error_response
testpoints.description: ICache returns error: fetch_fault_fetch flagged, instruction not stored.

testpoints.name: icache_page_fault
testpoints.description: ICache returns page fault: fetch_fault_page flagged.

testpoints.name: decode_accepts_fault
testpoints.description: Decode accepts fault: PC does NOT advance on fault (exception handler redirects via branch).

testpoints.name: branch_privilege_change
testpoints.description: Branch with privilege level change to S-mode (priv=1).

testpoints.name: back_to_back_sequential_fetch
testpoints.description: Two instructions fetched back-to-back: PC increments by 4 each time.

testpoints.name: decode_stall
testpoints.description: Decode not ready (fetch_accept_i=0): instruction stays pending_ready, PC does not advance.

testpoints.name: branch_overrides_pending_instruction
testpoints.description: Branch request while instruction is pending_ready: branch takes priority.

testpoints.name: invalidate_while_waiting
testpoints.description: Invalidate received while waiting for icache data: FSM resets, new request sent.

testpoints.name: icache_accept_and_valid_same_cycle
testpoints.description: ICache accepts request and returns data in same cycle: handled sequentially in process().
